author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
C.A.B.A. - Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PSVR2 Games
There's a station on Buenos Aires' Line H that only appears at night. You found it. C.A.B.A. is a short first-person survival horror experience, our take on the Backrooms metro level, coming to PS5 with PS VR2 support. 

Wishlist now on PlayStation Store - https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10019663

#ps5 #ps5games #psvr2 #psvr2games
